THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCOY, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 835 O'FARRELL STREET, #310, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $608.42 RENT, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $721.42, STAYED UNTIL JUN-16-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS; ANY PERS PROP LEFT AFTER 6/16/98 WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED; EACH PARTY WAIVES ANY ACTION AGAINST EACH OTHER ARISING FROM THIS ACTION.
